name: replaykit
description: Trace→golden replay regression harness: convert tracekit-recorded condukt run traces into evalkit golden replay cases. The sibling of curate (playbook→golden) — three subcommands (extract/verify/promote) pin a run's phase set, error count, and cost as a portable, self-verifying snapshot so regressions surface as a failing golden. Subscription-native (one bundled Rust binary, no API key).
